title: Citrusy Crisp Corn Tortilla
description: A nostalgic Slovakian dish featuring corn tortillas, with a citrus twist and suitable for those following a FODMAP-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: Corn Tortilla
ingredients.notes: Use corn tortillas that are fermentable for a FODMAP-friendly option

ingredients.name: Freshly squeezed orange juice
ingredients.notes: For best flavor, use freshly squeezed juice to avoid additives in store-bought citrus products

ingredients.name: Lemon zest
ingredients.notes: Lightly grated lemon peel for a zesty citrus kick

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: For cooking and flavoring the tortillas

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: To taste, adjust to personal preference

ingredients.name: Freshly squeezed lime juice (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a slight tangy note and more citrus flavor

instructions: Wash your hands thoroughly with soap.
Preheat a skillet over medium heat. Add olive oil to the skillet and warm it up.
Place the corn tortillas in the skillet one by one. Cook for about 30-45 seconds on each side until golden brown and crispy, stirring occasionally.
Remove from the skillet and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together freshly squeezed orange juice, lemon zest, salt, and optional lime juice. Stir well to combine.
Pour the citrus mixture over the tortillas and sprinkle with additional grated lemon peel if desired. Serve immediately as a snack or appetizer.
Enjoy your Citrusy Crisp Corn Tortilla.
